title: AN ACT SEPARATING THE DALIPUGA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL ГўВЂВ“ KABACSANAN ANNEX IN BARANGAY KABACSANAN, CITY OF ILIGAN, PROVINCE OF LANAO DEL NORTE FROM THE DALIPUGA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS KABACSANAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 6436; 109 OG No. 26, 4555 (July 1, 2013)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10441, April 08, 2013 ]

AN ACT SEPARATING THE DALIPUGA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL ГўВЂВ“ KABACSANAN ANNEX IN BARANGAY KABACSANAN, CITY OF ILIGAN, PROVINCE OF LANAO DEL NORTE FROM THE DALIPUGA NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, CONVERTING IT INTO AN INDEPENDENT NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL TO BE KNOWN AS KABACSANAN NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and

House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress

assembled:

SECTION 1.

Separation and Conversion into a

National High School.

ГўВЂВ“ The Dalipuga National High School ГўВЂВ“ Kabacsanan Annex in Barangay

Kabacsanan, City of Iligan, Province of Lanao del Norte is hereby

separated from the Dalipuga National High School and converted into an

independent national high school to be known as Kabacsanan National High

School.

SEC. 2.

Transfer of Assets and

Liabilities.

ГўВЂВ“ All

personnel, assets, liabilities and records of the Dalipuga National High

School ГўВЂВ“ Kabacsanan Annex are hereby transferred to and absorbed by the

Kabacsanan National High School.

SEC. 3.

Appropriations.

ГўВЂВ“ The Secretary

of Education

shall immediately include in the DepartmentГўВЂВ™s program the

operationalization of the Kabacsanan National High School, the initial

funding of which shall be charged against the current yearГўВЂВ™s

appropriations of the Dalipuga National High School ГўВЂВ“ Kabacsanan Annex.

Thereafter, the amount necessary for the continued operation of the

school shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 4.

Implementation.

ГўВЂВ“ The Secretary

of Education shall issue such rules and regulations as may be necessary

to carry out the purpose of this Act.

SEC. 5.

Effectivity.

ГўВЂВ“ This Act shall

take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

JUAN PONCE

ENRILE

President of the

Senate

(Sgd.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE

JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives

was

finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on

September 20, 2012 and January 28, 2013, respectively.

(Sgd.)

EMMA

LIRIO-REYES

Secretary of the

Senate

(Sgd.)

MARILYN B.

BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: APR 0 8 2013

(Sgd.)

BENIGNO S. AQUINO

III

President of the

Philippines
